metadata.description: The Media OS for Claude Code. One plugin, 96 production-grade skills covering FFmpeg, professional companion tools, OBS Studio, GStreamer/MediaMTX, broadcast IP (NDI, OTIO, HDR dynamic metadata, DeckLink, gphoto2), control protocols (MIDI, OSC, DMX, PTZ), system audio routing, VFX (USD, OpenEXR, OIIO), computer vision, WebRTC, and 2026 open-source AI media. Each skill is also a sealed folder at skills/<name>/ — users who want just one can copy the folder into their own .claude/skills/ directory.

plugins.name: media-os
plugins.description: The complete Media OS bundle — 96 skills across 9 layers. FFmpeg complete, professional companion tools, OBS Studio, streaming frameworks, broadcast IP, control protocols, system audio routing, VFX stack, computer vision, WebRTC, and 2026 open-source AI media. Install this if you want everything in one.
